task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard, calendar, or main menu is visible. The login screen is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the specific patient, Rosario Conn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient header or summary frame displays the name 'Rosario Conn' and DOB '2005-09-19'.

task_completion.description: The note title or subject line contains required refusal keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form input labeled 'Title', 'Subject', or similar contains text including 'Refusal', 'Refused', 'AMA', or 'Declined'.

task_completion.description: The note body specifies the refused procedure (MRI/Imaging).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for the note content contains the words 'MRI' or 'imaging'.

task_completion.description: The note body documents that risks were explained to the guardian.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for the note content contains keywords indicating a discussion of risks (e.g., 'risk', 'explained', 'discussed', 'consequences').

task_completion.description: The note is successfully saved and appears in the patient's chart history with a valid timestamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a list of notes, documents, or encounters for Rosario Conn that includes the newly created refusal note with the current date/time.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the OpenEMR web interface directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the standard OpenEMR user interface, not a text editor or raw database terminal.

integrity.description: Agent does not use command-line tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or command prompt windows are visible performing SQL injections or backend data manipulation.

integrity.description: The result is verified within the application's view mode, not just the edit mode.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the saved state (e.g., in a list or read-only view) rather than just the form being filled out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Rosario Conn (DOB: 2005-09-19). Refused Procedure: MRI. Valid Title Keywords: 'Refusal', 'Refused', 'AMA', 'Declined'. Required Body Content: Must mention 'MRI' or 'imaging' and indicate risks were discussed (e.g., 'risks', 'explained').
